V-M-003.checks: Provisioning and config generation remain compatible with route-aware topology, including configs exported for operator-managed internal clients. QR codes use ERROR_CORRECT_H (30% recovery) for reliable scanning. Two QR endpoints: /config/qr (AmneziaWG, raw WireGuard) and /config/qr/amnezia (AmneziaVPN, JSON containers format).

scenarios.scenario: Provisioning selects correct topology and routing policy
Config rendered successfully for provisioned client
